name: Silver Stain (SDS-PAGE)

components.name: 1. Fix gel: 50% MeOH + 12% AcOH + 0.05% formaldehyde, ≥1 h (overnight OK), RT

note.en: Fix in 200 mL fixer per standard mini gel. Removes SDS and stops protein migration. Minimum 1 h; overnight improves sensitivity.
note.zh: 每块标准 mini 胶用 200 mL 固定液。去除 SDS 并停止蛋白迁移。最少 1 h；过夜固定可提高灵敏度。

note.en: Removes acetic acid and most methanol. Fresh EtOH each wash.
note.zh: 去除乙酸和大部分甲醇。每次用新鲜乙醇。

components.name: 3. Sensitize: 0.02% Na₂S₂O₃ (sodium thiosulfate) in water, exactly 1 min, RT

note.en: CRITICAL: exactly 1 min. Sensitization enhances silver binding to proteins. Immediately wash 3 × 20 s ddH₂O after.
note.zh: 关键：精确计时 1 min。增强银与蛋白的结合。立即用 ddH₂O 洗 3 × 20 s。

note.en: Rapid rinses only — do not over-wash here.
note.zh: 快速冲洗——此步不可过长。

components.name: 5. Silver impregnation: 0.2% AgNO₃ + 0.075% formaldehyde, 20 min, 4°C or RT

note.en: Prepare fresh: 0.2 g AgNO₃/100 mL ddH₂O + 75 µL 37% formaldehyde. 4°C gives more uniform staining. Protect from light.
note.zh: 新鲜配制：0.2 g AgNO₃/100 mL 水 + 75 µL 37% 甲醛。4°C 染色更均匀。避光操作。

note.en: Removes unbound silver. Do not over-rinse.
note.zh: 去除未结合的银。不可过长冲洗。

components.name: 7. Develop: 6% Na₂CO₃ + 0.05% formaldehyde + 0.0004% Na₂S₂O₃, RT; monitor until bands appear

note.en: Develop time: 30 s – 10 min. Monitor carefully — over-development gives dark background. Fresh developer required. Swirl gently throughout.
note.zh: 显影时间：30 s – 10 min。仔细监控——过度显影导致背景过深。需新鲜配制显影液。轻柔摇动。

components.name: 8. Stop: 50% MeOH + 12% AcOH, 10 min; rinse 3 × ddH₂O, 5 min each

note.en: Immediately add stop solution as soon as desired staining intensity is reached. Final rinse in ddH₂O before imaging.
note.zh: 达到所需染色强度后立即加终止液。成像前用 ddH₂O 末次冲洗。

components.name: 9. Image gel on white-light transilluminator or scanner

note.en: Use flatbed scanner (600 dpi minimum) or gel documentation system with white light. For densitometry: Image Lab or ImageJ.
note.zh: 用平板扫描仪（至少 600 dpi）或凝胶成像系统（白光）拍照。密度扫描：Image Lab 或 ImageJ。

detailedSteps.en: Run SDS-PAGE gel according to standard protocol. Rinse gel in ddH₂O briefly to remove SDS.
detailedSteps.zh: 按标准方案 SDS-PAGE 电泳。短暂 ddH₂O 冲洗胶去除 SDS。

detailedSteps.en: Fix gel: place in container with 200 mL fixative (50% MeOH + 12% AcOH + 0.05% formaldehyde) per mini gel. Incubate on shaker at RT for ≥1 h (overnight is fine — increases sensitivity).
detailedSteps.zh: 固定：每块 mini 胶加 200 mL 固定液（50% MeOH + 12% AcOH + 0.05% 甲醛）。RT 摇床孵育 ≥1 h（过夜更好——提高灵敏度）。

detailedSteps.en: Wash in 50% EtOH: 3 × 20 min on shaker at RT. Use fresh EtOH for each wash.
detailedSteps.zh: 50% EtOH 洗涤：3 × 20 min，RT 摇床。每次用新鲜 EtOH。

detailedSteps.en: Sensitize: 0.02% sodium thiosulfate (Na₂S₂O₃) in ddH₂O. CRITICAL: soak exactly 1 min. Longer = high background. Immediately proceed to rinses.
detailedSteps.zh: 增敏：ddH₂O 中 0.02% 硫代硫酸钠（Na₂S₂O₃）。关键：精确 1 min。过长 = 高背景。立即进入冲洗步骤。

detailedSteps.en: Rinse: ddH₂O, 3 × 20 s rapid washes. Do not over-rinse.
detailedSteps.zh: 冲洗：ddH₂O，3 × 20 s 快速冲洗。不可过长。

detailedSteps.en: Prepare silver nitrate solution fresh: 0.2 g AgNO₃ dissolved in 100 mL ddH₂O + 75 µL 37% formaldehyde. Protect from light. Can be used at RT or pre-chilled to 4°C for more uniform staining.
detailedSteps.zh: 新鲜配制硝酸银溶液：0.2 g AgNO₃ 溶于 100 mL ddH₂O + 75 µL 37% 甲醛。避光。RT 使用或预冷至 4°C 可使染色更均匀。

detailedSteps.en: Impregnate gel in silver solution: 20 min at RT (or 4°C) on shaker. Protect from light throughout.
detailedSteps.zh: 银溶液中浸染：RT（或 4°C）摇床 20 min。全程避光。

detailedSteps.en: Rinse gel in ddH₂O: 2 × 20 s to remove unbound silver.
detailedSteps.zh: ddH₂O 冲洗胶：2 × 20 s 去除未结合银。

detailedSteps.en: Prepare developer fresh: 6% Na₂CO₃ + 0.05% formaldehyde + 0.0004% Na₂S₂O₃ in ddH₂O. For 100 mL: 6 g Na₂CO₃ + 50 µL 37% formaldehyde + 400 µL of 0.1% Na₂S₂O₃.
detailedSteps.zh: 新鲜配制显影液：ddH₂O 中 6% Na₂CO₃ + 0.05% 甲醛 + 0.0004% Na₂S₂O₃。100 mL 用量：6 g Na₂CO₃ + 50 µL 37% 甲醛 + 400 µL 0.1% Na₂S₂O₃。

detailedSteps.en: Develop gel: immerse in developer, gently shake. Bands appear in 30 s – 10 min. Monitor closely — over-development causes dark background and high noise. When bands reach desired intensity, immediately proceed to stop solution.
detailedSteps.zh: 显影：胶浸入显影液，轻柔摇动。条带在 30 s – 10 min 内出现。密切监控——过度显影导致背景深、噪声高。条带达到所需强度时立即进入终止液。

detailedSteps.en: Stop reaction: transfer gel to stop solution (50% MeOH + 12% AcOH). Incubate 10 min on shaker.
detailedSteps.zh: 终止反应：胶转移至终止液（50% MeOH + 12% AcOH）。摇床孵育 10 min。

detailedSteps.en: Rinse gel in ddH₂O: 3 × 5 min to remove acid.
detailedSteps.zh: ddH₂O 冲洗胶：3 × 5 min 去除酸。

detailedSteps.en: Image gel using flatbed scanner (≥600 dpi) with white light transillumination, or gel documentation system. For densitometry quantification: use Image Lab or ImageJ.
detailedSteps.zh: 平板扫描仪（至少 600 dpi）白光透射成像，或凝胶成像系统。密度定量：Image Lab 或 ImageJ。

briefSteps.en: Fix gel 1 h–O/N → 50% EtOH wash 3× → Sensitize 1 min (Na₂S₂O₃) → Rinse → Silver nitrate 20 min → Rinse → Develop (monitor bands) → Stop → Image
briefSteps.zh: 固定胶 1 h–过夜 → 50% EtOH 洗 3× → 增敏 1 min（Na₂S₂O₃）→ 冲洗 → 硝酸银 20 min → 冲洗 → 显影（监控条带）→ 终止 → 成像

note.en: Fixed gel in 50% MeOH/12% AcOH can be stored at RT for up to 1 week before proceeding
note.zh: 固定后的胶在 50% MeOH/12% AcOH 中 RT 可保存最多 1 周再继续处理

note.en: Stained gel in stop solution can be stored at RT for several days; image as soon as possible for best quality
note.zh: 终止液中的染色胶 RT 可保存数天；尽快成像以获得最佳质量

notes.en: Sensitivity: 1–10 ng protein/band (10–100× more sensitive than Coomassie). MS-compatible silver stain: omit glutaraldehyde and formaldehyde (use Shevchenko MS-compatible protocol: sensitizer = sodium thiosulfate, developer = Na₂CO₃ only). Interference: keratin (skin) gives false bands — wear gloves, use clean reagents. Contamination with dust/fingerprints ruins gel.
notes.zh: 灵敏度：1–10 ng 蛋白/条带（比考马斯蓝灵敏 10–100 倍）。质谱兼容银染：省去戊二醛和甲醛（用 Shevchenko MS 兼容方案：仅用硫代硫酸钠增敏，Na₂CO₃ 显影）。干扰：角蛋白（皮肤来源）产生假阳性条带——戴手套，使用清洁试剂。灰尘/指纹会损坏结果。

ref: Shevchenko et al. (1996) Anal Chem 68:850–858; Blum et al. (1987) Electrophoresis 8:93–99; Mortz et al. (2001) Proteomics 1:1359

materials.name: Gel imaging system or flatbed scanner

label.zh: 试剂 4°C 保存 6 个月稳定

usage.en: Silver stain for SDS-PAGE gels to detect proteins at nanogram sensitivity (1–10 ng/band), 10–100× more sensitive than Coomassie blue.
usage.zh: SDS-PAGE 凝胶银染检测蛋白，灵敏度 1–10 ng/条带，比考马斯亮蓝高 10–100 倍。
